parameters.content: First checker layer: deterministic QA only. It reads veem-qa-billing-data/data/current-workbook.json, flags source-data and missing-fee exceptions, writes qaCheckerLatest back to the data-bucket object, and writes the latest summary/CSV under data/qa. The hosted UI reads the latest summary through the separate Billing QA Status API workflow so this checker does not need site-bucket permissions.
